productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess F Logo Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Sapphire blue round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% polyester, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, printed brand name and logo on the chest in large lettering, two silver stripes on the shoulder blades, and engineered with the ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean This sporty sapphire blue t-shirt from adidas is the answer to your question: what can I wear to the gym, for Sports, and to the pizza place? Engineered with ClimaLite technology, the tee draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Wear this versatile tee for all your sporting activities and for casual outings. Pair it with jeans or tracks for the wow effect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
